title: Version bump to v2.0.0-rc.15 + CHANGELOG entry — CLI surface contraction summary (35→20 flags, 7→5 commands)
description: Final commit of rc.15 chain. Bump version from v2.0.0-rc.14 to v2.0.0-rc.15 across root + workspace packages (packages/cli, packages/server, packages/shared, packages/dashboard if version-pinned). Add new CHANGELOG.md entry above the rc.14 entry summarizing the contraction: 4 flag-kill batches (TASK-001..003), 5 command-tree edits (TASK-004), 1 schema dedupe (TASK-005). Quantify the contraction: ~35 flags → ~20 flags net; 7 commands (install, doctor, serve, uninstall, scan, hooks, plan-context-hint) → 5 visible (install, doctor, serve, uninstall, config) + 1 hidden (plan-context-hint). After commit, the user runs Gemini code review + coverage report ONCE for the entire rc.15 chain per memory feedback_review_batching.md. Commit: `chore(rc15): bump to v2.0.0-rc.15 — CLI surface contraction (35→20 flags, 7→5 commands)`

files.change: Update `"version": "2.0.0-rc.14"` → `"version": "2.0.0-rc.15"` (or whatever rc.14 currently is — read first to confirm baseline)

Same bump to 2.0.0-rc.15; verify workspace dependency pins on @fenglimg/fabric-shared and @fenglimg/fabric-server use workspace:* (no version update needed there) — if they pin to explicit version, bump those too

files.target: version field (if it exists and is pinned)
files.change: Verify if dashboard tracks main version; if yes, bump to 2.0.0-rc.15

files.target: above the existing rc.14 entry (above L8)
files.change: Insert new rc.15 section with header `## [2.0.0-rc.15] - 2026-05-14`. Body summarizes: (a) **Breaking — CLI surface contraction**: list killed flags by command (install: --force/--reapply/--interactive/--no-bootstrap/--no-mcp/--no-hooks/--mcp-install/--scope, renamed --plan→--dry-run; uninstall: --force/--interactive/--no-bootstrap/--no-mcp/--no-scaffold/--purge/--clean-empties, renamed --plan→--dry-run, --clean-empties becomes default; doctor: --force, renamed --apply-lint→--fix-knowledge, added --rescan; serve: --force). (b) **Breaking — Command tree pruning**: deleted top-level `fab hooks` (helpers moved to install/hooks-orchestrator.ts), deleted top-level `fab scan` (fold into `fab doctor --rescan`); stripped `fab config install` and `fab config hooks` subcommands; hidden `fab plan-context-hint` from --help (still callable by hook scripts); wired `fab config` as rc.16 placeholder. (c) **Schema**: deduped `auditMode`/`audit_mode` → snake_case only. (d) **UX**: rewrote ServeLockHeldError message to drop --force suggestion, show PID + kill cmd guidance. (e) **Migration**: drift recovery is now `fab uninstall && fab install` (was `fab install --force` or `--reapply`). Reference contraction stats: ~35 flags → ~20 flags; 7 commands → 5 visible + 1 hidden.

implementation: Read package.json at root + 4 workspace packages to confirm current version is 2.0.0-rc.14 (or whatever previous rc; per gitStatus the most recent commit references rc.13, so rc.14 may or may not be in flight — verify before editing)
Update version field in all 5 (or however many) package.json files to 2.0.0-rc.15
Read CHANGELOG.md L1-L60 to locate the rc.14 entry header position (L8 per exploration)
Insert new rc.15 section above the rc.14 entry. Use the same heading depth and structure as existing rc.X entries for consistency

Cross-check rc.15 entry against TASK-001..TASK-005 commit messages to ensure no item is missed (4 flag-kill commits + 1 command-tree commit + 1 schema commit + this version bump = 6 git commits in the rc.15 chain)
Run `pnpm install` to refresh lockfile if any workspace versions changed
Run `pnpm test` + `pnpm typecheck` + `pnpm lint` at root — verify all green (this is the rc.15-gate before tagging)
Run Gemini code review + coverage report ONCE for the entire rc.15 chain (per memory feedback_review_batching.md) — this is a separate step, not part of the commit itself
git add + commit with message: `chore(rc15): bump to v2.0.0-rc.15 — CLI surface contraction (35→20 flags, 7→5 commands)`

reference.pattern: Project release pattern (v2.0.0 RC chain): each rc.X bumps all workspace package.json versions in lockstep + adds a CHANGELOG entry above the previous rc. Per memory project_v2_rc_continuation.md: v2.0.0 was tagged locally but never published; rc.5+ continues v2.0.0-rc chain → eventual v2.0.0 stable. rc.15 is one rung on that ladder. Per memory feedback_review_batching.md: review+coverage runs ONCE at end of multi-task lite-plan chain, not per-task.
reference.examples: Recent commits to follow style: `abbc706 fix(rc13): bump to v2.0.0-rc.13 + knip ignore .cursor/hooks/** + stale init.ts → install.ts`; `22dc6a6 refactor(rc12): bump to v2.0.0-rc.12 + SessionStart gate removal + fab install rename + fabric_language unification`. Pattern: `<type>(rc<N>): bump to v2.0.0-rc.<N> — <one-line summary of biggest items>`.

criteria: All workspace package.json files declare `"version": "2.0.0-rc.15"` (root + packages/cli + packages/server + packages/shared, and packages/dashboard if pinned — verify with `grep '"version":' package.json packages/*/package.json`)
CHANGELOG.md contains a `## [2.0.0-rc.15] - 2026-05-14` section above the rc.14 entry

rc.15 CHANGELOG section lists ALL killed flags by command (install/uninstall/doctor/serve), ALL command-tree edits (hooks/scan/config/plan-context-hint), schema dedupe, and ServeLockHeldError message rewrite — verified by cross-checking against TASK-001..TASK-005 commit messages
rc.15 CHANGELOG section explicitly documents the migration path: `fab uninstall && fab install` for drift recovery
`pnpm install` succeeds with no lockfile errors after version bump
`pnpm test` exit 0 (final gate — confirms TASK-001..TASK-005 all integrated cleanly)
git log shows the rc.15 chain as exactly 6 commits (TASK-001..TASK-006), all on `main` branch, sequential history

rationale.chosen_approach: Final commit isolates version bump + CHANGELOG from refactor commits — the refactor commits are reviewable on their own, the version bump is a trivial mechanical change. Aligns with established project rhythm (every prior rc.X follows this pattern per gitStatus recent commits).
alternatives_considered: Bake version bump into TASK-005 (last refactor commit)
Split version bump and CHANGELOG into two commits
Tag the release within this commit
decision_factors: Separation of concerns: refactor vs. release-metadata
Consistency with prior rc.X commit pattern (`chore(rcN): bump...`)
CHANGELOG drafting needs the full TASK-001..TASK-005 commit messages as input — sequencing as last commit guarantees completeness
rationale.tradeoffs: Adds one commit to the chain. Negligible cost. Tagging is deferred — user explicitly tags via `git tag v2.0.0-rc.15` after this commit if/when they wish to publish.

manual_checks: Read CHANGELOG.md and verify the rc.15 section reads coherently end-to-end
Verify Gemini review + coverage steps run AFTER this commit (per memory feedback_review_batching.md — review happens once for the whole chain)
success_metrics: CHANGELOG entry passes human read-through (cohesive narrative, no missing items vs TASK-001..005)
unit: existing test suite (no new tests in this commit)
integration: full pnpm test suite as integration gate
